name: interp_single
note: single {{ }} interpolation
source:
---
params:
  - name = str
---
Hello {{ name }}!

name: interp_multiple
note: multiple interpolations on one line
source:
---
params:
  - a = str
  - b = str
---
{{ a }} and {{ b }}

name: interp_trailing_newline_preserved
note: a trailing newline in the body is preserved verbatim
source:
---
params:
  - name = str
---
Hi {{ name }}

name: dotted_path_one_level
note: field access on a struct param
source:
---
params:
  - u = struct(name = str)
---
{{ u.name }}

name: dotted_path_two_levels
note: nested struct field access
source:
---
params:
  - u = struct(profile = struct(city = str))
---
{{ u.profile.city }}

name: struct_duck_typing_extra_field_ignored
note: extra fields on a struct value are ignored (structural typing)
source:
---
params:
  - u = struct(name = str)
---
{{ u.name }}

name: scalar_int_negative
note: negative integer renders without formatting
source:
---
params:
  - i = int
---
{{ i }}

name: scalar_float
note: float renders with minimal representation
source:
---
params:
  - f = float
---
{{ f }}

name: scalar_bool_true
note: boolean true renders as 'true'
source:
---
params:
  - b = bool
---
{{ b }}

name: scalar_bool_false
note: boolean false renders as 'false'
source:
---
params:
  - b = bool
---
{{ b }}

name: filter_upper
note: upper filter
source:
---
params:
  - s = str
---
{{ s | upper }}

name: filter_lower
note: lower filter
source:
---
params:
  - s = str
---
{{ s | lower }}

name: filter_trim
note: trim filter
source:
---
params:
  - s = str
---
[{{ s | trim }}]

name: filter_chain_trim_lower
note: chained filters apply left to right
source:
---
params:
  - s = str
---
{{ s | trim | lower }}

name: filter_fixed
note: fixed(n) formats a float to n decimals
source:
---
params:
  - f = float
---
{{ f | fixed(2) }}

name: filter_join
note: join(sep) joins a list of strings
source:
---
params:
  - xs = list(str)
---
{{ xs | join(", ") }}

name: filter_limit
note: limit(n) truncates a list
source:
---
params:
  - xs = list(str)
---
{{ xs | limit(2) | join(",") }}

name: filter_add
note: add(n) numeric filter
source:
---
params:
  - n = int
---
{{ n | add(3) }}

name: filter_sub
note: sub(n) numeric filter
source:
---
params:
  - n = int
---
{{ n | sub(4) }}

name: if_true
note: if branch taken when condition truthy

name: if_false_else
note: else branch taken when condition falsy

name: if_string_equality
note: equality comparison in condition

name: for_list_str
note: for over a list of strings

name: for_list_struct
note: for over a list of structs (shorthand element type)

name: for_nested
note: nested for loops

name: for_else_empty
note: for/else renders else body when the list is empty

name: match_unit_variant
note: match on a unit enum, string-encoded value

name: match_struct_variant_field
note: match on an enum with a struct variant and read a field

name: match_via_type_alias
note: match on a param typed by an enum alias

name: enum_literal_in_condition
note: compare an enum param against a namespaced enum literal
source:
---
types:
  - Stage = enum(Design, Build)

params:
  - s = Stage
---

> {% if s == Stage.Build %}

building

> {% else %}

other

> {% /if %}

name: option_has_some
note: has() is true for a present option

name: option_has_present_string_none
note: a present option holding the literal string 'None' is present -> has() true [D1]

name: option_has_absent_default_none
note: has() is false for an option defaulted to None -> else branch (formerly D1; Rust and TS now agree)

name: narrow_if_true_unwraps_value
note: inside `if has(o)` the option is unwrapped to its inner value [D1]

name: narrow_negated_else_unwraps_value
note: in the else of `if !has(o)` the option is present and unwrapped [D1]

name: narrow_match_some_arm_unwraps_value
note: the Some arm of a match on an option unwraps the inner value [D1]

name: fn_len_list_and_str
note: len() on a list and on a string
source:
---
params:
  - xs = list(str)
  - s = str
---
{{ len(xs) }} {{ len(s) }}

name: fn_kinds_and_kind
note: kinds(Enum) lists variants; kind(Enum.Variant) names one
source:
---
types:
  - Stage = enum(Design, Build, Deploy)

params: []
---
{{ kinds(Stage) | join(",") }} {{ kind(Stage.Build) }}

name: consts_rendered
note: a const is available during rendering
source:
---
consts:
  - MAX = int := 3

params: []
---
{{ MAX }}

name: env_rendered
note: a compile-time env value is available during rendering
source:
---
env:
  - REGION = str

params: []
---
{{ REGION }}

name: default_used_when_param_omitted
note: a param default is injected when the value is not supplied
source:
---
params:
  - greeting = str := "Hi"
---
{{ greeting }}!

name: default_overridden_by_param
note: an explicit param overrides its default
source:
---
params:
  - greeting = str := "Hi"
---
{{ greeting }}!
